description: Product Description New Fashion Style Warm Winter Beanie + Ultra Bright LED Headlamp 2 in 1, Fit for Men and Women. HIGHEVER LED Hat is a premium compression fleece 2 in 1 beanie hat with lights that provides the perfect hands-free lighting solution for any situation. LED Hat powers on five LED lights, which are angled down for close-up tasks. The USB-rechargeable light has three levels of brightness settings that let you see and be found in the dark, giving you hands-free visibility (and warmth) when camping, dog walking, shoveling, running, fishing, or anytime you need more light. HIGHEVER LED Hat perfect for workers outside or workers in low-light conditions, in garages, woodshops, warehouses or for doing detail work where extra light is needed. 5 LED Built-in 300mAh high capacity and standard USB port for charging the battery, 1.5 hours can be fully charged up to 7 hours of continuous use. HIGHEVER LED Hat is a comfortable and usable item that easily integrates into most situations. Integrating this accessory into the household gives the wearer the reassurance of preparation. Keeps You Warm and Safe at Night The HIGHEVER LED Hat is very suitable for various outdoor activities, such as jogging, camping, biking, hiking, fishing, walking the dog, hunting, and traveling. At the same time, this knitted LED beanie can also be used wherever you want to work, illuminate and free your hands. Whether it is a man or a woman wearing it, it can warm their ears and head. Let everyone stay warm throughout the cold winter. The HIGHEVER LED Hat with three modes(Low/Strong/SOS) not only helps to illuminate your road at night but also ensures that you can be seen by others at night. When you are walking in the dark or facing an emergency, it keeps you safe and visible. Unique design makes you more comfortable to use. Unlike the heavy headlamp, HIGHEVER LED hat is lightweight, soft and cozy. It lights up and keeps you warm, but never weight you down when wearing for a long time. In order to make night outdoor activities safer in winter, HIGHEVER is committed to continuously improving the quality of its products. The upgraded HIGHEVER LED Hat has a longer lighting work time. LED Hat Is an Ideal Gift That Makes People Feel Warm and Loving The HIGHEVER LED Hat is made of high-quality snug and elastic knitted material. It's a best gift for giving Dad/ father/ Mother/ Mom/ Husband/ Wife/ Grandpa/ Grandma and your Friend in winter. HIGHEVER LED Hat with LED is a Warm Gifts For Men and Women, a better alternative top-notch option as gifts for men, women, teen boys, and girls as a birthday gift, Christmas gift, Thanksgiving Day's gift, and any special occasions. The hands-free HIGHEVER LED Hat is the cool gift for men women teen boys teen girls who like fishing, camping, hiking, skiing, cycling and other outdoor activities. Detachable LED, Washable Beanie The HIGHEVER LED Hat is made of high-quality knitted material that will make you feel warm and comfortable to use. It can be illuminated by installing a 1.5-inch LED, which is light and does not feel heavy. This unique design can free your hands. Even if HIGHEVER LED Hat is dirty, don't worry. The 1.5-inch LED light is easy to remove and clean the Beanie. The New Upgraded LED Hat 5 LED Lights: The configuration of 5 LED lights makes the light brighter and the field of vision clearer. 3 Light Modes(Low/strong/SOS): The newest light mode for emergency providing more safety. Excellent Charge Way: The upgraded charging port design is more durable and safer than other Excellent USB ports. Why Choose HIGHEVER Upgraded LED Hat? Others: 4 LED lights: The configuration of 4 LED lights makes the light dim and low visibility. 2 Mode(Low/strong): There are few light mode choices and not conducive to safe outdoor activities at night. External USB: Easy to break when installing.
